name: MSI MEG X870E GODLIKE E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-9000(OC) - 7x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - Marvell AQC113CS 10Gb LAN - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 - Optical S/PDIF (X87EGODLIKE)
shortName: MSI MEG X870E GODLIKE E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0
description: Premium E-ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with X870E chipset, DDR5 support, dual PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7 for extreme builds.
